title: grewia orbiculata
intro: Grewia orbiculata, also known as the Round-leaved Grewia or Round-leaved Cluster-fig, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Grewia orbiculata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Grewia orbiculata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
